scenario.name: VOS-RS registered extension outbound UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]reg[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]reg[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 300 [authentication username=2001 password=Demo2001!] Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "[field2]" <sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]extension[call_number] To: <sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=extension 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS extension outbound c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000

ACK sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "[field2]" <sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]extension[call_number] To: <sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 ACK Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "[field2]" <sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]extension[call_number] To: <sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=2001 password=Demo2001!] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=extension 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS extension outbound c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000

ACK sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field2]" <sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]extension[call_number] To: <sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 ACK Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field2]" <sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]extension[call_number] To: <sip:[field3]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 5 BYE Content-Length: 0
